summary: Most requested frontend features appear implemented via new sections/pages, hash-based routing, content additions, and generatedImages wiring. However, the diff summary does not provide evidence that the required AI-generated image files were actually added under frontend/public/assets/generated. Several additional unrelated content/UX changes also appear to have been introduced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a chainsaw-themed homepage/site-wide background image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and use it in the global background layer.
missing_requirements.reason: Code references the chainsaw background path, but the diff summary does not show any new static asset files added under frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the Schoolhouse sneak-peek scenic elevation image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: The Schoolhouse content references the image path, but the diff summary does not show the actual image file being added to frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the Slider Doom booth key art image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and ensure the booth card displays it via generatedImages mapping.
missing_requirements.reason: generatedImages is wired to '/assets/generated/booth-slider-doom.dim_1400x900.jpg', but the diff summary does not show that image asset being added under frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the Sharks Hell booth key art image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and ensure the booth card displays it via generatedImages mapping.
missing_requirements.reason: generatedImages is wired to '/assets/generated/booth-sharks-hell.dim_1400x900.jpg', but the diff summary does not show that image asset being added under frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the Laser Hell scare zone key art image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and ensure the zone card displays it via generatedImages mapping.
missing_requirements.reason: generatedImages is wired to '/assets/generated/zone-laser-hell.dim_1400x900.jpg', but the diff summary does not show that image asset being added under frontend/public/assets/generated.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed HomeHeroSection behavior including a new 'accessibility-aware strobe/flash background effect layer'.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in any REQ; BuildRequest focuses on new background image + new Schoolhouse/booths/zone content and navigation.

hallucinated_features.description: Expanded/modified Auditions content including new roles (e.g., Costume Manager, Masks Manager) and expanded roles list.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; auditions changes are outside REQ-1..REQ-7 scope.

hallucinated_features.description: Expanded/modified HauntedHousesSection content (new taglines/descriptions, sub-scenes, wait-time information, and location information).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; BuildRequest did not ask to rewrite haunted houses content.

hallucinated_features.description: Expanded/modified InfoLocationSection (operating hours, ticket pricing, pass types, detailed rules subsections, 11pm nightly release warning).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; BuildRequest does not mention modifying the info/location section content.
